calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Mar-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jason M. Rose of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs
Plaintiff John Nulty appearing in pro per
Plaintiff Michael Nulty appearing in pro per, as trustee to the Estate and as successor-in-interest to James Nulty, deceased

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR APPORTIONMENT PROCEEDING AND FOR AN ORDER TO DISTRIBUTE SETTLEMENT FUNDS

No appearance for plaintiffs Joyce Harrington and Patrick Nulty. Plaintiffs John Nulty and Michael Nulty were sworn and examined by the Court. The Court, having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, made the following ruling: Plaintiffs' motion for apportionment proceeding and for an order to distribute settlement funds are granted. The parties are entitled to the following proportions: Estate of James Nulty - 0%; Estate of Elsie Nulty - 0%; Michael Nulty - 40%; John Nulty - 40%, Patrick Nulty - 20%. The signature of Michael Nulty shall be sufficient on all settlement documents. Refer to signed order for all the details of the ruling. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Cathy Meyer of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #11596 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)
